name: Southern Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Anita Douglas
Preparation Time: 1 hour
1. Thaw the pie crust and pinch the edges of the crust to give it a homemade look.
2. Beat eggs. Add flour, sugar, dark corn syrup, light corn syrup, salt, and vanilla extract. Mix well until combined.
3. Stir in the pecans and pour the mixture into a 9-inch deep dish pie shell.
4. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes, then reduce the temperature to 300°F and bake for an additional 45 to 50 minutes.
5. Cover the edges of the crust with thin strips of foil during the first 30 minutes of baking to prevent overbrowning.
6. Allow the pie to cool for 1 hour before serving.
